## Summary
- [ ] Linked issue / Jira ticket: <!-- e.g. W16B-42 -->
- [ ] High-level explanation of the change

## Validation
- [ ] I ran backend checks: `python -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && python backend/manage.py test`
- [ ] I ran frontend checks: `cd frontend && npm install && npm run lint`
- [ ] CI is green or I have explained any failures.

## Review Checklist
- [ ] Branch uses the required `W16B-XX-short-description` naming.
- [ ] Commits are scoped and have descriptive messages.
- [ ] At least one reviewer has been requested.
- [ ] I have responded to reviewer comments (or left clarifying replies).

Please keep discussion focused on the PR so that meaningful review history is
preserved for tutors.
